description_long: This is a two-story urban house with a brick facade on the lower level and a lighter, possibly stucco or painted finish on the upper level. The front yard features a small, landscaped garden with flowers and a stone border, while the side yard includes a large tree and a patio area with outdoor furniture and a green canopy. The house has multiple rectangular windows with visible grilles, arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, and a prominent front door with a small step. The rear and one side of the house are enclosed by a tall, plain wall, providing privacy for the backyard. The roof is flat, and the overall design is simple and functional, typical of modern urban residential architecture.
description: A two-story urban house with a brick lower facade, landscaped front garden, flat roof, and a private backyard with a large tree and patio.
description_view_0: Side view showing two windows, interior room divisions, and a glimpse of the backyard garden and tree.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the brick facade, main entry door, landscaped garden, and windows; the backyard and tree are visible to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a large tree, patio area with a green canopy, and the enclosing wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tree, patio, and the plain exterior wall with minimal window openings.
attribute_entryway_design: Single main door with a small step, brick surround, and adjacent landscaped garden
